title: Super Mario World Texture Pack
description: This is Super Mario World Texture Pack.
body:
This is a texture pack for Super Mario World.

Sprite made by Nintendo (Super Mario World and Super Mario Maker 2) and me (Matheus Lucas).

I'll be adding more things soon, including textures from the mods.

This texture depends on OptiFine/Continuity and Entity Model Features.

Continuity:https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity

Entity Model Features:https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features

OptiFine:https://optifine.net/downloads

There are more websites where you can download this texture:
CurseForge:https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/super-mario-world-texture-pack
Planetminecraft:https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/super-mario-world-texture-pack/

![Super Mario World Texture Pack logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2bf73d39e349609cb0711b45d2742776cbf34381.png)

You can join my Discord server (SMW Texture Pack)!!!
https://discord.gg/RhWfwZyVT
